_description: Drop4 UI asset manifest. Each entry generates one PNG via Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image). Run: node tools/gen-art.mjs [--only=<group>] [--force] [--dry-run]
_style_lockup: Every prompt should include the shared style lockup so the full UI pack reads as one game. If you tweak this, regenerate with --force so nothing drifts.
_style_lockup_text: Premium mobile game UI asset for 'Drop4', a stylized Connect-4 game. Dark navy background, neon orange and warm gold accents, subtle purple highlights, glossy plastic + metal material mix. Flat but dimensional, no text, clean edges, slight inner glow, drop shadow. Mobile game polish like Basketball Stars or Candy Crush Saga. No clutter, no borders, centered subject. Render as a transparent PNG.

items.prompt: Premium mobile game icon: a small glossy house with a warm glowing window, facing camera straight on. Dark navy + orange accents, neon rim light, slight gold reflection. Centered, transparent background, no text. Mobile game polish like Basketball Stars or Candy Crush.

Premium mobile game icon: a bullseye target with a dart stuck dead-center. Glossy orange and navy, neon rim light, gold glint on the dart tip. Centered, transparent background, no text. Mobile game polish.
Premium mobile game icon: a backpack with a glowing gem poking out the top. Glossy orange + navy, neon rim, gold zippers. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game icon: a stylized bust silhouette inside a glowing circular frame, like a character portrait plaque. Glossy navy + orange, gold ring accent. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy shopping bag with a small star hanging off it. Orange handles, navy body, gold star. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Wide mobile game button background: dynamic orange-to-deep-orange gradient with a faint Connect-4 board pattern in the distance, warm glow, diagonal light streaks. No text, edges fade to transparent. Premium mobile game feel like Basketball Stars.

Wide mobile game button background: deep purple-to-violet gradient with faint city skyline silhouette, trophy glint, subtle spotlight beams. No text, edges fade to transparent. Premium mobile game feel.

Wide mobile game button background: teal-to-cyan gradient with two stylized controllers facing each other, warm glow between them, faint dotted connection line. No text, edges fade to transparent. Premium mobile game feel.

Portrait mobile game background: a stylized arena stage floor with concentric orange glow rings, dark navy depth above, subtle purple nebula dots, warm spotlight from below. No characters, no text, just the environment. Premium polish, Candy Crush Saga meets Basketball Stars.

Portrait mobile game background: a stylized marketplace stall interior, wood-and-neon shelving in soft focus, warm lanterns, subtle gold dust particles. Dark navy top fading to warm bottom. No characters, no text, just the environment.
Portrait mobile game background: stylized city skyline at sunset (Brooklyn-coded), orange-purple sky, silhouetted buildings, warm windows glowing, dusky clouds. No characters, no text.
Portrait mobile game background: stylized hall-of-fame wall with soft spotlight, gold filigree accents, navy velvet texture, faint trophy silhouettes in depth. No characters, no text.

Mobile game item card frame: 9-slice compatible, dark navy interior, glossy metallic border, subtle corner rivets, neon orange inner rim line. No text, transparent center, edges define the frame. Premium polish.

Mobile game portrait frame: ornate gold circular ring, sports-card-style bevel and engraved detail, slight wear, inner shadow. No content in center (transparent), edges define the frame. Like an NBA 2K MyPlayer portrait ring.

Premium mobile game coin: a thick golden coin, face-on perspective, glossy bevel, raised central emblem (simple round medallion, no letters), warm gold + soft orange gleam, subtle rim highlight. Centered, transparent background, no text or numerals. Looks like a Candy Crush or Basketball Stars game coin.

Premium mobile game gem: a cut sapphire-blue gemstone, pointed octahedral shape, brilliant facets, deep blue core with bright cyan highlights, faint purple rim, glowing inside. Centered, transparent background, no text. Looks like a premium-currency gem in a polished mobile game.

Premium mobile game flame icon: a stylized glossy red-orange flame with a bright warm-yellow core, single tongue of fire, slight curl at the top, neon rim glow. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a streak or fire meter.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy t-shirt on a hanger, slightly angled. Warm orange shirt, navy hanger hook, gold rim light. Centered, transparent background, no text. Mobile game polish.

Premium mobile game icon: a Connect-4 style grid board seen at a slight 3/4 angle, dark navy frame, blue circles cut out, one red and one yellow piece dropped in. Glossy plastic. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: two glossy plastic game-piece discs, one red on top-left, one yellow on bottom-right, overlapping slightly, soft shadow. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game icon: a four-pointed sparkle star with rays of light, glowing warm yellow core, purple rim, tiny supporting sparkles. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a visual effect or drop effect.
Premium mobile game icon: a chunky gold trophy cup with a starburst behind it, glossy gold, navy handles, tiny red gem set in the base. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: an ornate square picture frame with a gold rim and navy interior, empty center, slight 3/4 angle, subtle glow inside. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy speech bubble with a smiling face inside, warm orange bubble, navy face, gold rim. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game icon: a stylized dog face, friendly, slightly chubby, glossy fur, big shiny eyes, warm brown-and-cream colors, soft pink tongue peeking out. Centered, transparent background, no text.
Premium mobile game icon: a glossy wrapped gift box, warm orange paper, gold ribbon in a neat bow, slight glow escaping from under the lid, 3/4 angle. Centered, transparent background, no text.

Premium mobile game sparkle particle: a simple four-pointed white-to-gold star with bright core and soft halo glow, fading to transparent edges. Centered, transparent background, no text. Tileable VFX sprite for celebration bursts.

Premium mobile game celebration burst: a cluster of small glossy gold coins flying outward from center, golden light rays behind, warm soft glow. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents a coin-pickup burst moment.

Premium mobile game victory hero element: a large gleaming gold trophy cup with a bright sunburst behind it, purple-to-navy radial backdrop fading to transparent, confetti particles in the air, subtle gold dust. Centered, transparent background except the sunburst, no text. Hero element for the win screen.

Premium mobile game lighting element: a warm golden spotlight beam cone pointing straight down on a dark navy surface, illuminating a soft circular glow on the floor, subtle dust particles in the beam. Centered composition, rest of frame transparent, no text. Meant to sit behind a character on a home-screen stage.

Premium mobile game stage floor element: a wide glossy circular platform disc seen at a low angle, dark navy top with a neon orange rim light and subtle blue inner glow, slight reflection on the surface, floating in transparent space. Centered, transparent background, no text. Goes under a character on the home lobby.

Premium mobile game wordmark: the word 'DROP4' in chunky 3D block letters, hand-painted game-logo style, warm orange and deep red gradient on the letters with a glossy bevel and subtle gold rim highlight. The '4' is stylized as a Connect-4 game piece slot with a tiny red disc dropping into it. Dark navy outline, slight motion-smear streak behind the letters to suggest energy. Centered, transparent background except the letters and drop shadow. Polished like Basketball Stars or Clash Royale game logos. No additional text or subtitle, no borders.

Premium mobile game icon: a stylized silhouette of a person mid-dance, one arm up in the air, slight hip pop, glossy orange with gold rim light, navy inner shadow, energetic pose. Centered, transparent background, no text. Chibi-ish proportions, readable at small sizes. Represents an emote or dance-move menu.

Premium mobile game icon: a stylized silhouette of a person in a confident standing idle pose, hands on hips, slight lean. Glossy orange with gold rim light, navy inner shadow. Centered, transparent background, no text. Chibi-ish proportions, readable at small sizes. Represents an idle-animation selector.

Horizontal elongated rounded rectangle banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, NOT a circle, NOT a coin, NOT a medallion — a stretched lozenge bar shape like a racing stripe or a name-plate tag. Silver-gray metallic gradient filling the full width, rounded pill ends, subtle white rim highlight along the top edge, soft drop shadow underneath, clean matte finish. The shape spans edge-to-edge of the canvas horizontally and only ~half the canvas vertically. Centered, transparent background, no text, no icons, no characters, no additional decorations. Represents the 'Common' tier label plate.

Horizontal elongated rounded rectangle banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, NOT a circle, NOT a coin, NOT a medallion — a stretched lozenge bar shape like a racing stripe or a name-plate tag. Emerald-green metallic gradient with lime highlights filling the full width, rounded pill ends, subtle lime rim highlight along the top edge, soft drop shadow underneath. The shape spans edge-to-edge of the canvas horizontally and only ~half the canvas vertically. Centered, transparent background, no text, no icons, no characters. Represents the 'Uncommon' tier label plate.

Horizontal elongated rounded rectangle banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, NOT a circle, NOT a coin, NOT a medallion — a stretched lozenge bar shape like a racing stripe or a name-plate tag. Sapphire-blue glossy gradient with cyan highlights filling the full width, rounded pill ends, cyan rim highlight along the top edge, soft drop shadow underneath. The shape spans edge-to-edge of the canvas horizontally and only ~half the canvas vertically. Centered, transparent background, no text, no icons, no characters. Represents the 'Rare' tier label plate.

Horizontal elongated rounded rectangle banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, NOT a circle, NOT a coin, NOT a medallion — a stretched lozenge bar shape like a racing stripe or a name-plate tag. Royal-purple to magenta glossy gradient with violet inner shimmer filling the full width, rounded pill ends, violet rim highlight along the top edge, soft drop shadow underneath. The shape spans edge-to-edge of the canvas horizontally and only ~half the canvas vertically. Centered, transparent background, no text, no icons, no characters. Represents the 'Epic' tier label plate.

Horizontal elongated rounded rectangle banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, NOT a circle, NOT a coin, NOT a medallion — a stretched lozenge bar shape like a racing stripe or a name-plate tag. Warm-orange to deep-gold glossy gradient with sparkle shimmer filling the full width, rounded pill ends, bright gold rim highlight along the top edge, strong drop shadow underneath. The shape spans edge-to-edge of the canvas horizontally and only ~half the canvas vertically. Centered, transparent background, no text, no icons, no characters, no stars, no trophies. Represents the 'Legendary' tier label plate.

Horizontal elongated rounded rectangle banner, 4:1 aspect ratio, NOT a circle, NOT a coin, NOT a medallion — a stretched lozenge bar shape like a racing stripe or a name-plate tag. Crimson-red to hot-pink glossy gradient with faint holographic rainbow sheen across the surface filling the full width, rounded pill ends, bright white-hot rim highlight along the top edge, heavy drop shadow underneath. The shape spans edge-to-edge of the canvas horizontally and only ~half the canvas vertically. Centered, transparent background, no text, no icons, no characters. Represents the 'Mythic' tier label plate — the top tier.

Premium mobile app icon: a chunky glossy red Connect-4 style disc with a large numeral '4' engraved into its face, warm orange rim light, subtle neon glow, sitting inside a rounded-square icon backdrop that fades from deep navy to warm orange radial glow behind the disc. Centered, fills the square, no text anywhere — the '4' on the disc is the only glyph and must be bold and readable. Designed for iOS/Android home-screen icons at small sizes. Polished like Candy Crush or Basketball Stars app icons.

Premium mobile game splash-screen hero: a giant chunky glossy red Connect-4 style disc floating in space, a single numeral '4' engraved on its face, sparks and warm golden light rays radiating outward, subtle Connect-4 board silhouette in the blurred background, navy-to-warm-orange radial backdrop fading to transparent at the edges. Centered, dominant subject. The only glyph anywhere is the '4' on the disc. No other text, no wordmark.

Premium mobile game locked slot: a dark navy silhouette of a question mark inside a glossy circular portrait frame, faint orange rim light, small padlock icon at the bottom-right corner. Centered, transparent background, no other text. Used for unrevealed career opponents.

Premium mobile shop featured-deal banner background: a dynamic diagonal gradient from deep purple to warm orange with sparkle dust and subtle lens-flare streaks, faint cascading gold coin silhouettes in the background blur, soft vignette on the edges. No text, no logos, just the atmospheric backdrop ready for a deal card to sit on top. Edges fade toward transparent.

Premium mobile game level-up VFX hero: a radial sunburst of warm golden light rays exploding from center, confetti particles, soft glowing rings expanding outward, warm orange-to-white gradient core, fades to transparent at the edges. Centered, transparent background, no text. Used as an overlay when the player levels up.

Premium mobile game icon: a glossy triangular 'play' arrow symbol pointing right, chunky and beveled, warm orange gradient with bright rim highlight and subtle inner glow. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents the main play / quick-match mode button.

Premium mobile game icon: a glossy gold trophy cup with a purple neon rim glow behind it, a single star on the cup's face, dark navy handles, subtle gold sparkles. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents career mode progression.

Premium mobile game icon: two glossy smartphone silhouettes angled toward each other, slight overlap, warm teal rim light between them, soft glow connecting line. Centered, transparent background, no text. Represents local pass-and-play mode.
